context: Agent must produce all three canonical test double types (Stub, Mock, Fake) that correctly implement the given repository interface

checklist.name: All three classes implement IProductRepository
checklist.description: StubProductRepository, MockProductRepository, and InMemoryProductRepository each have 'implements IProductRepository' in their class declaration

checklist.name: Stub returns fixed data
checklist.description: StubProductRepository.findById returns a hardcoded Product object (not null, not dynamic) regardless of the id argument

checklist.name: Mock records save call
checklist.description: MockProductRepository has a property (savedProduct or equivalent) that is set to the product argument when save is called, and starts as null

checklist.name: Fake uses a Map for storage
checklist.description: InMemoryProductRepository stores products in a Map<string, Product> and all three methods (findById, save, findAll) operate against that map

checklist.name: Fake findAll returns all stored products
checklist.description: InMemoryProductRepository.findAll returns Array.from of the map's values (or equivalent), not a hardcoded array

checklist.name: Types are correct
checklist.description: findById return types are Promise<Product | null>, save returns Promise<void>, and findAll returns Promise<Product[]> across all three implementations
